SGR LLM call: returns (parsed_output_or_None, sgr_trace_entry, tok_info).
Update confirmed_values in-place from DISTINCT query results.
Phase-based SQL pipeline. Returns (stats dict, eval Thread or None).
Resolve phase: confirm task identifiers against DB before pipeline cycles.
Resolve identifiers in task_text against DB. Returns confirmed_values or {} on f
Post-execution pipeline evaluator. Fail-open: any exception returns None.
Compute agents_md_coverage and schema_grounding. Returns dict with both floats.
Evaluate pipeline trace. Returns PipelineEvalOutput or None on any failure.
Schema-aware SQL validator: unknown columns, unverified literals, double-key JOI
Check queries against schema. Returns first error string or None if all pass.
Parse AGENTS.MD into {section_name: [lines]} for each ## section.
Security gate evaluation — gates loaded from data/security/*.yaml.
Load all gate definitions from *.yaml files in directory, sorted by filename.
Apply security gates to SQL queries. Returns error message or None if all pass.
Check if a file path access is blocked by path_prefix gates.
Load persisted cache, filtering stale entries (>7 days).
Persist current cache to disk. Non-critical — failure is silently ignored.
Detect if model supports response_format. Returns 'json_object' or 'none'.     C
Build response_format dict for the given mode, or None if mode='none'.
Flatten system prompt blocks to plain string for non-caching tiers.
True for Ollama-format models (name:tag, no slash).     Examples: qwen3.5:9b, de
True for claude-code/* aliases routed to iclaude subprocess.
Determine LLM provider for a model call.     Explicit cfg['provider'] wins; fall

Call LLM with MODEL_FALLBACK retry (FIX-417). Primary model through all tiers fi
Map alias (e.g. 'anthropic/claude-haiku-4.5') to Anthropic API model ID.
PrephaseResult has exactly the expected fields — no log or preserve_prefix.
run_prephase() takes only (vm, task_text) — no system_prompt_text.
vm.tree and vm.context are never called.
If AGENTS.MD missing, agents_md_content is empty, no crash.
Normal mode calls vm.exec for schema and digest queries.
vm.exec exception → db_schema is empty string, no crash.
VM mock that handles read (AGENTS.MD) and exec (.schema + PRAGMA + SELECT).
PrephaseResult has agents_md_index and schema_digest fields.
agents_md_index has parsed sections from AGENTS.MD.
agents_md_index is empty dict if AGENTS.MD not found.
schema_digest is empty dict if all exec calls fail.
SQL_PLAN → VALIDATE ok → EXECUTE ok → ANSWER ok.
EXPLAIN returns error → LEARN called → SQL_PLAN retried → success.
3 cycles all fail → OUTCOME_NONE_CLARIFICATION without ANSWER LLM call.
DDL query → security gate blocks → LEARN → retry → success.
LEARN updates session_rules but does not write rule files (append_rule removed).
_call_llm_phase returns (obj, sgr, tok) — tok has input/output keys.
_run_learn with error_type='llm_fail' must not add to session_rules.
LEARN sgr_trace entry must contain 'error_type' field.
session_rules never exceeds 3 entries (FIFO) across multiple LEARN calls.
_build_static_system does not include IN-SESSION RULE (those go to user_msg).
_build_static_system returns list[dict], last block has cache_control.
total_in_tok and total_out_tok are non-zero after successful pipeline run.
Evaluator thread starts even when all cycles fail.
_system_as_str flattens list[dict] blocks to newline-joined text.
Test that the 4 pipeline models are present in models.py
Test that all vault classes have been removed from models.py
Test that models.py contains exactly 6 BaseModel classes (4 pipeline + 2 resolve
run_agent calls run_pipeline for all tasks.
run_agent() result must not contain builder_*/contract_*/eval_rejection_count fi
run_agent() always returns a plain dict (public API unchanged).
Gates with verified: false are not loaded.
_has_where_clause correctly detects WHERE in queries with subqueries.
CTE query with WHERE in the final SELECT passes the sec-002 gate.
Outer WHERE present despite double-quoted identifier containing WHERE substring.
Outer SELECT with WHERE passes even when subquery also has WHERE.
SELECT without WHERE is blocked by sec-002.
